messages.content:
我想在
```shellscript
rjob submit \
    --priority=9 \
    --name=${RJOB_NAME} \
    --gpu=${GPU_NUM} \
    --memory=${MEMORY} \
    --cpu=${CPU} \
    --charged-group=${CHARGED_GROUP} \
    --private-machine=group \
    --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/p1-shared:/mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared \
    --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/liyizhuo:/mnt/shared-storage-user/liyizhuo \
    --image=${IMAGE} \
    --enable-sshd \
    --host-network=true \
    --image-pull-policy=IfNotPresent \
    -P ${NODE_COUNT} \
    -e DISTRIBUTED_JOB=true \
    -e PROC_PER_NODE=${GPU_NUM} \
    -- bash -exc '
        LOGFILE="/mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/scripts/logs/rjob_$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log"
        mkdir -p "$(dirname "$LOGFILE")"
        /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/scripts/task_slime.sh 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOGFILE"
    '
```
这个脚本后面加一个脚本让gpu空转，防止机器自动释放，应该加什么，task_slime的内容如下：
```shellscript
export WANDB_BASE_URL=https://api.wandb.ai
export WANDB_MODE=offline
export WANDB_API_KEY=5cb606567741f22337bbbd70cf464c2951631e9a

# cd /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/code/slime
# bash /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/code/slime/scripts/Asy_BAse_8.sh
# bash /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/code/slime/scripts/DecoupleLambd.sh
# cd /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/tmp/slime
# bash /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/tmp/slime/scripts/Debug.sh
# cd /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/code/p1-slime
# bash /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/code/p1-slime/scripts/Base.sh
pip install math_verify
cd /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/code/slime
# bash /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/code/slime/scripts/P1_asyppo.sh
# bash /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/code/slime/scripts/P1_test.sh
# bash /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/code/slime/scripts/Single_1.7B.sh
bash /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/code/slime/scripts/P1_cp2.sh
```

你可以在脚本末尾添加一个 GPU 空转程序来防止机器自动释放。以下是几种方案：

## 方案1：使用 Python GPU 空转脚本（推荐）

```shellscript
rjob submit \
    --priority=9 \
    --name=${RJOB_NAME} \
    --gpu=${GPU_NUM} \
    --memory=${MEMORY} \
    --cpu=${CPU} \
    --charged-group=${CHARGED_GROUP} \
    --private-machine=group \
    --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/p1-shared:/mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared \
    --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/liyizhuo:/mnt/shared-storage-user/liyizhuo \
    --image=${IMAGE} \
    --enable-sshd \
    --host-network=true \
    --image-pull-policy=IfNotPresent \
    -P ${NODE_COUNT} \
    -e DISTRIBUTED_JOB=true \
    -e PROC_PER_NODE=${GPU_NUM} \
    -- bash -exc '
        LOGFILE="/mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/scripts/logs/rjob_$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log"
        mkdir -p "$(dirname "$LOGFILE")"
        /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/scripts/task_slime.sh 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOGFILE"
        
        # GPU 空转防止机器释放
        echo "Task completed. Starting GPU idle loop to prevent machine release..."
        python3 -c "
import torch
import time
print(f\"GPUs available: {torch.cuda.device_count()}\")
tensors = []
for i in range(torch.cuda.device_count()):
    device = torch.device(f\"cuda:{i}\")
    # 分配一些显存保持 GPU 占用
    tensor = torch.ones(1000, 1000, device=device)
    tensors.append(tensor)
    print(f\"GPU {i} occupied\")

print(\"GPU idle loop started. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\")
while True:
    # 执行简单的 GPU 计算保持活跃
    for i, tensor in enumerate(tensors):
        _ = tensor @ tensor
    time.sleep(60)  # 每分钟计算一次
" || echo "GPU idle loop ended"
    '
```

## 方案2：使用简单的无限循环

```shellscript
-- bash -exc '
        LOGFILE="/mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/scripts/logs/rjob_$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log"
        mkdir -p "$(dirname "$LOGFILE")"
        /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/scripts/task_slime.sh 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOGFILE"
        
        # 保持任务运行防止释放
        echo "Task completed at $(date). Keeping job alive..."
        tail -f /dev/null
    '
```

## 方案3：使用 nvidia-smi 定期查询

```shellscript
-- bash -exc '
        LOGFILE="/mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/scripts/logs/rjob_$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log"
        mkdir -p "$(dirname "$LOGFILE")"
        /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/scripts/task_slime.sh 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOGFILE"
        
        # GPU 空转
        echo "Task completed. Starting GPU monitoring loop..."
        while true; do
            nvidia-smi
            sleep 300  # 每5分钟输出一次 GPU 状态
        done
    '
```

## 推荐方案

**我推荐使用方案1**，因为它：
1. 真正占用 GPU，确保资源不被回收
2. 有明确的日志输出
3. 可以根据需要调整计算频率和显存占用

如果你只是想简单地保持任务运行而不需要实际占用 GPU，**方案2最简单**（`tail -f /dev/null`）。

你可以根据实际需求选择合适的方案！
